markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 62. Navigation Dist. Pilot Boards
##### § 62.068 — Recovery of Pilotage Charges

(a) A pilot may recover in court compensation for pilotage or services offered.

(b) A pilot may bring suit to recover the payment under Section 62.067 (Unauthorized Pilot Liability) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A pilot may recover in court compensation for pilotage or services offered.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A pilot may bring suit to recover the payment under Section 62.067 (Unauthorized Pilot Liability) .
